Metadata.defaultDescription: Collaborative, Wikipedia-style books about historical figures. Sign up to create and edit.

NewBook.autoGenDescription: full TOC and chapter drafts in one guided flow (WebGPU).
NewBook.importJsonDescription: From the local openbook-bookbuilder tool. Opens as a draft—verify the figure, then publish from Drafts.
NewBook.figureFocusBlurb: One book focuses on one historical figure. Add sections from the book page or split content with Markdown headings for now.
NewBook.figureCreateHint: Create book is disabled until you see ✓ next to the figure name (after Check name → pick a person → Use selected person). You can still Save as draft and finish later from Drafts.

SectionEdit.deleteChapterConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete the chapter {title}? This cannot be undone.

Contribute.metaDescription: Mission of OpenBook and how to help maintain the project: GitHub, local development, linting, and UI translations.
Contribute.title: Contribute to OpenBook
Contribute.subtitle: For developers and maintainers who want to improve the app and documentation.
Contribute.missionP1: OpenBook is a wiki-style library for biographies: each book follows one historical figure, with sections, full revision history, and collaboration similar to Wikipedia.
Contribute.missionP2: Readers and editors use the site for content; this page is about keeping the codebase healthy—bug fixes, features, accessibility, performance, and translations of the interface.
Contribute.helpIntro: The source code is public. Here are practical ways to support maintenance:
Contribute.helpBulletGithub: Open issues for bugs or ideas, discuss changes, and submit pull requests on GitHub.
Contribute.helpBulletLocal: Clone the repo, run npm install, copy .env.example to .env (set DATABASE_URL and AUTH_SECRET), apply migrations (e.g. npm run db:migrate), then npm run dev. See the repository README for details.
Contribute.helpBulletLint: Run npm run lint before opening a PR so CI-style checks stay green.
Contribute.helpBulletTranslations: UI copy lives in messages/en.json. After adding or changing keys, run npm run messages:sync so other locale files stay valid (see README).

Home.title: Historical figure books
Home.intro: OpenBook is a wiki-style library: anyone can sign up, start a book about a historical figure, and collaborate with revisions and history—like Wikipedia, focused on biographies.
Home.searchPlaceholder: Search by figure, title, tags, or URL…
Home.filterHint: Country and language options come from books in the library. Age / audience uses the standard list on each book.
Home.noBooksYet: No books yet. Sign in and create the first one.

Auth.signInBlurbGoogle: Sign in with Google or the email and password you registered with.
Auth.signInBlurbEmail: Use the email and password you registered with.

BookLanguageEdit.intro: Chapters without a title and body in this language stay dimmed here and are hidden from readers when they view the book in this language. Use each row to open the editor for that chapter.

CreateBook.title: New book
CreateBook.blurb: Create a collaborative biography-style book. You can add sections and revisions after saving.

BookForm.intendedAgesHint: Used for browsing filters and for local AI (reading level and tone).
BookForm.primaryLanguageHintCreate: You can add more languages after the book is created (book settings).
BookForm.primaryLanguageHintEdit: Default for fallbacks and new chapters. Add or translate other languages in the list above the form.
BookForm.countryHintCreate: Used for browsing filters on the home page.
BookForm.countryHintEdit: Shown on the book page and used for filters on the home screen.
BookForm.slugCreate: URL slug (optional — short figure name + title if empty)
BookForm.slugEditWarning: Changing this moves the book to a new URL; links using the old address will stop working.
BookForm.figureEditHint: Save is disabled until ✓ appears next to the figure name, or you leave the name unchanged from when you opened this page.

AutoBook.title: Auto book (local AI)
AutoBook.blurb: Generate a draft book in your browser with WebLLM. Publishing still runs on the server.

Settings.title: Settings
Settings.digestHint: In-app items for books you do not watch.

ProfileReports.title: Your reports
ProfileReports.empty: You have not submitted any reports.

ProfileWatches.title: Watched books
ProfileWatches.empty: You are not watching any books.

ModerationReports.title: Content reports
ModerationReports.intro: Review open reports, add public comments visible on the transparency log, then close each report with an outcome and a public summary.
ModerationReports.publicSummaryHint: This text appears on the public report log together with the reporter’s original message.
ModerationReports.internalNoteHint: Visible only to stewards and administrators.
ModerationReports.commentHint: Shown on the public log while this report is still open.

ModerationLog.title: Content report log
ModerationLog.intro: Public transparency log of how reported content was handled, including each reporter’s original message and follow-up moderator actions.
ModerationLog.threadReplyCount: {count, plural, =1 {# public update} other {# public updates}}
ModerationLog.expandThread: Show full thread for this report
ModerationLog.reportFiledBook: A reader filed a content report about this book.
ModerationLog.reportFiledSection: A reader filed a content report about this section.

BookReportLog.title: Content reports for this book
BookReportLog.intro: Public log of reports filed about this book: each reporter’s message and how reports were handled.
BookReportLog.empty: No public report activity for this book yet.

ReportForm.title: Report content
ReportForm.hint: Describe the problem (minimum 10 characters). Moderators will review.

BookExportColophon.p1Before: This ebook was produced from a manuscript hosted on
BookExportColophon.p1After: , where each biography is written and refined collaboratively online.
BookExportColophon.p2BeforeLib: If you would like to help
BookExportColophon.p2Mid: with new figures or topics, or to
BookExportColophon.p2After: , visit the site and create an account—contributions from readers keep the project going.

Errors.bookNotDraft: This book is not a draft (or it was already published).
Errors.signInForReferences: You must be signed in to fetch references.
Errors.reportTooShort: Please describe the issue (at least 10 characters).
Errors.passwordLength: Password must be at least 8 characters.
Errors.emailExists: An account with this email already exists.
Errors.figurePick: Use “Check name”, choose a matching person, then “Use selected person” — or restore the original figure name when editing.
Errors.figurePickStale: Figure choice no longer matches catalog search. Run Check name again and pick again.
Errors.countryTooLong: Country / region must be 255 characters or fewer.
Errors.titleFigureRequired: Title and historical figure name are required.
Errors.slugDerive: Could not derive a URL slug from the title and figure name.
Errors.slugReserved: That URL slug is reserved. Choose another.
Errors.intendedAgesRequired: Intended ages or audience is required (who should be able to read this book?).
Errors.intendedAgesInvalid: Choose a valid age / audience from the list.
Errors.primaryLanguageFromBook: Choose a valid primary language from this book’s languages.
Errors.slugExists: A book with this URL slug already exists.
Errors.wizardSectionRange: This draft needs between 1 and {max} sections.
Errors.chapterNeedsBody: Each chapter needs a title, slug, and non-empty body.
Errors.anotherSlug: Another book already uses this URL slug.
Errors.slugInUse: That URL slug is already in use.
Errors.languageAlreadyOnBook: That language is already on this book.
Errors.sectionExists: A section with this URL slug already exists in this book.
Errors.sectionOrderMismatch: Section list does not match this book.
Errors.invalidSectionOrder: Invalid or duplicate section in order.
Errors.onlyCreatorWizard: Only the book creator can use the auto wizard on this book.
Errors.onlyCreatorLoadWizard: Only the book creator can load wizard data for this book.
Errors.onlyCreatorRunWizard: Only the book creator can run the wizard on this book.
Errors.noValidNewSections: No valid new sections (duplicates, reserved slugs, or empty titles were skipped).
Errors.cannotDeleteOnlySection: You cannot delete the only section. Add another section first, then delete this one.
Errors.deleteTitleMismatch: The title you typed does not match this book. Enter the exact book title to confirm deletion.
Errors.titleMaxLength: Title must be at most {max} characters.
Errors.onlyStewardResolve: Only Steward-tier contributors or site administrators can resolve reports.
Errors.reportPublicSummaryTooShort: Public summary must be at least 10 characters.
Errors.reportPublicCommentTooShort: Comment must be at least 5 characters.
Errors.reportPublicCommentOnlyOpen: Public comments can only be added while the report is open.
Errors.figureVerifyFailed: Could not load name suggestions. Try again.
Errors.deleteDraftTitleMismatch: The title you typed does not match this draft. Enter the exact title from your drafts list to confirm deletion.
Errors.invalidChapterJson: Chapters JSON must be a JSON array of objects with title, body, and optional slug.
Errors.bookDraftImportInvalidJson: The JSON could not be parsed.
Errors.bookDraftImportInvalidPayload: This file is not a valid book draft (version 1).

Drafts.title: Your drafts
Drafts.intro: Only you can see these. Draft books use the normal book editor (table of contents and chapters); publish from the book’s edit page when the figure is verified. Chapter and legacy JSON drafts publish from here.
Drafts.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this draft? This cannot be undone.
Drafts.deleteContentDraftHint: To delete this draft, type its title below. It must match the Title column exactly.
Drafts.deleteContentDraftConfirmLabel: Type the draft title to confirm
Drafts.confirmDeleteDraftBook: Are you sure you want to delete the draft book {title}? This cannot be undone.
Drafts.confirmDeleteAdminBook: Are you sure you want to permanently delete the book {title} and all of its chapters? This cannot be undone.
Drafts.newIntro: Choose what you want to work on.
Drafts.newBookHint: Save book metadata and optional chapter JSON until you publish.
Drafts.newChapterHint: Write a new section for a book that already exists.
Drafts.newBookPageIntro: Fill in the form; nothing is public until you publish from the drafts list or this page later.
Drafts.newChapterPageIntro: Target an existing book by its URL slug. Publishing creates a new section with your Markdown body.
Drafts.corruptPayload: This draft could not be loaded. Delete it and start again.
Drafts.draftBookBannerIntro: Verify the historical figure with Check name, pick the correct person, then publish. The book will appear in the public catalog.
Drafts.draftBookContentsHint: This book is still a draft. Publish or delete it from book details:
Drafts.deleteDraftBookHint: Deletion is permanent. The typed title must match the book title exactly before Delete is enabled.
Drafts.deleteDraftBookUnderRowIntro: To remove this draft book permanently, type its title below.
Drafts.deleteDraftBookConfirmLabel: Type the book title to confirm
Drafts.editContentHint: Save as a draft and open the table of contents to add or reorder chapters.
Drafts.draftBookActionsAriaLabel: Publish or delete this draft book
Drafts.importBookJsonLinkHint: Load a book draft file from the local openbook-bookbuilder tool (or any compatible export).
Drafts.importBookJsonIntro: Paste JSON or choose a .json file. You will be taken to the book draft editor to verify the figure and publish.
Drafts.importBookJsonHint: Format: version 1 payload with title, figureName, intendedAges, defaultLocale, and optional chapters array.
